# Acme Corp Refund Policy

## Overview
Acme Corp offers a customer-friendly refund policy designed to ensure satisfaction
with every purchase. This document describes the conditions, timelines, and process
for requesting and receiving a refund.

## Eligibility Window
Customers may request a full refund within 30 days of the original purchase date.
Purchases older than 30 days but within 90 days are eligible for store credit only.
After 90 days, purchases are no longer eligible for any refund or store credit.

## Eligible Items
Physical products must be returned in their original, unopened packaging to qualify
for a refund. Digital products and subscription services are refundable within 14
days of purchase provided that less than 20 percent of the included usage has been
consumed.

## Refund Process
To request a refund, the customer must submit a request through the support portal
with the order number and reason for return. Refund requests are reviewed within two
business days. Approved refunds are issued to the original payment method within five
to seven business days.

## Non-Refundable Items
Gift cards, downloadable software licenses that have been activated, and personalized
or custom-made products are non-refundable under all circumstances.

## Shipping Costs
Original shipping charges are non-refundable. Return shipping costs are the
responsibility of the customer unless the return is due to a defect or an error by
Acme Corp, in which case Acme Corp covers the return shipping.
